issue.title: HandsOnApp rotate the image in non UI Thread

comment.body: @topherbuckley codex is going in circles between several different solutions. After switching from managing them in ui thread to a separate one, we have a threading issue. If processing takes more than a frame, race conditions might happen between updates. I have decided to simply drop some frames if system is overloaded. Another option is allowing slight discrepancy between debugInfo.image and the rest of debugInfo. Codex doesn't like both
